sql_array: CREATE TABLE http_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
SELECT http_lock((SELECT content FROM http_test WHERE id = 1) || ' fallback.html');
SELECT http_lock('password') || (SELECT MAX(id) FROM http_test WHERE content IS NOT NULL);
SELECT http_lock('admin') || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM http_test WHERE content = 'test1' OR content = '');
SELECT http_lock(CONCAT('user:', (SELECT MIN(id) FROM http_test)), 'error.html') AS response;
CREATE TABLE edge_case_test (id INT, value NUMERIC, str_value VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO edge_case_test (id, value, str_value, created_at) VALUES (1, 1.1, NULL, NOW()), (2, NULL, 'test2', NOW());
SELECT http_lock('secret123') || (SELECT AVG(value) FROM edge_case_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
SELECT DISTINCT http_lock('public') || (SELECT str_value FROM edge_case_test WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL AND value IS NULL);
SELECT http_lock(COALESCE((SELECT str_value FROM edge_case_test WHERE str_value = '' LIMIT 1), 'default.html')) || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edge_case_test WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day');
SELECT http_lock('password') || (SELECT SUM(id) FROM (SELECT id FROM http_test GROUP BY id HAVING id > 0) sub);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_lock_test (id INT, locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE);
INSERT INTO temp_lock_test (id, locked) VALUES (1, TRUE), (2, FALSE);
SELECT http_lock(MIN(CASE WHEN locked THEN 'locked_page.html' ELSE 'unlocked_page.html' END)) || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_lock_test);
